title: Editas Medicine Inc (EDIT) Earnings Dates, Call Summary & Reports
text:
Editas Medicine Earnings Calendar and Expected Financial Milestones

Upcoming Earnings Dates:
Editas Medicine is expected to report next quarterly earnings on August 11, 2026, with an earnings per share (EPS) estimate of approximately -$0.28, reflecting continued losses as the company develops EDIT-401.

Full Year Expectations:
For full fiscal year 2026, the company is projected to report negative earnings reflecting ongoing R&D investments in the EDIT-401 program and general operating expenses.

Revenue Forecast:
Revenue for 2026 is expected to decline 34.37% versus 2025 due to reduced collaboration revenue as some licensing partnerships mature. However, potential milestone payments from preclinical and early clinical data could offset some of this decline.

Cash Burn and Runway:
The company's quarterly cash burn is estimated at $25-30 million post-restructuring, supporting operations into Q3 2027 based on current cash balances of approximately $123.6 million.

Clinical Catalyst Timeline:
The most significant near-term catalysts are IND/CTA filing (mid-2026), first patient dosed (late 2026), and preliminary clinical data (end 2026). These milestones will significantly influence investor sentiment and stock valuation.
